name_he: פורטל הנתונים הפתוחים הממשלתי (data.gov.il) - CKAN API
name_en: Israel Government Open Data Portal (data.gov.il) CKAN API
publisher: מערך הדיגיטל הלאומי (Israel National Digital Agency)
historical_coverage: varies per dataset; portal active since ~2011, CKAN since ~2018
feeds: CKAN revision/activity feeds; no RSS per dataset observed
robots_policy: API paths fetchable; no block observed on /api/3/action/*
terms_status: government open data terms; per-dataset license field
license_status: mixed per dataset: 'אחר (פתוח)' (Other-Open), CC-BY, some unlicensed
rag_permission: generally yes for open-licensed datasets; check per-dataset license field
recommended_ingestion: CKAN API polling (package_search by org/tag) + datastore_search for tabular resources
example_documents: package_search?q=משפט returned success:true, 18 datasets incl. court_specialists, magistrate-court-list; q=חברות returned 21 incl. ica_companies
notes: Verified live 2026-07-11: JSON API returns success:true. API docs at https://data.gov.il/api/docs. Direct curl through our egress proxy blocked (403 CONNECT) but standard HTTP access works. Hub for most records below.

name_en: Israeli Companies Registry Extract (Registrar of Companies)
publisher: משרד המשפטים - רשות התאגידים (Ministry of Justice - Israeli Corporations Authority)
historical_coverage: full current registry snapshot incl. registration dates back to Mandate-era companies; liquidation/dissolution status
metadata_availability: full CKAN metadata; field-level schema in datastore
hebrew_quality: native; includes English company names field
recommended_ingestion: daily CSV bulk download or incremental datastore_search; join with ica-changes for deltas
example_documents: resource 'רשימת החברות' CSV 253.2MB, last_modified 2026-07-09; fields: registration number, name, English name, status, registration date, liquidation/dissolution data
notes: Core entity-resolution backbone for a legal platform (company numbers = מספר ח.פ). package_show verified live 2026-07-11.

name_en: Changes in Companies and Partnerships (Corporations Authority)
recommended_ingestion: poll CKAN resource for company/partnership change deltas to keep entity graph fresh
example_documents: slug ica-changes ('פרטי שינויים בחברות ושותפויות'), seen in package_search q=חברות (21 results total)
notes: Companion delta feed to ica_companies. package_show not individually fetched (rate limit); metadata from live package_search response.

name_en: Registry of Amutot (NPOs) and Public Benefit Companies
publisher: משרד המשפטים - רשם העמותות (Registrar of Associations)
historical_coverage: full current registry; registration dates historical
metadata_availability: full CKAN metadata, verified via package_show
recommended_ingestion: weekly CSV bulk sync of 4 resources (registered amutot, legal entities, permanent status, public benefit companies)
example_documents: Resources: Registered Associations CSV 48MB (2026-06-27), Permanent Valid Legal Status CSV 39.3MB, Public Benefit Org Records CSV 695KB
notes: package_show verified live 2026-07-11. Key for nonprofit-law and 'ניהול תקין' due-diligence workflows.

name_he: היחידה לחופש המידע - מאגר פסקי דין (judgments)
name_en: Freedom of Information Unit - FOI Court Judgments Dataset
publisher: משרד המשפטים - היחידה הממשלתית לחופש המידע
historical_coverage: FOI judgments of district and supreme courts, cases from ~2021
metadata_availability: case ID, parties, judges, outcome, summary
legal_risk: low (contains party names - privacy care in outputs)
recommended_ingestion: one-time load; low value vs. full judiciary decisions portal (covered by case-law agent)
example_documents: Judgments CSV ~54KB (2022-09-12): case IDs, claimant/defendant names, judges, decisions, summaries
notes: IMPORTANT: this is NOT the full national case-law corpus - only FOI-related judgments. No general 'all court decisions' dataset exists on data.gov.il; full case law lives on the Judiciary's own decisions portal (separate registry entry). Verified via package_show 2026-07-11.

name_en: Government Procurement Tenders Report (Government Procurement Administration)
recommended_ingestion: periodic CSV sync; combine with sibling dataset 'exemptions' (דוח התקשרויות בפטור, same publisher, Other-Open license) for tender-exemption case work; richer live tender data available via BudgetKey search API (tenders doc-type)
example_documents: slugs 'tenders' (דוח מכרזים) and 'exemptions' (דוח התקשרויות בפטור) seen in live package_search q=מכרזים (6 results)
notes: Relevant to procurement-law practice (עתירות מכרזים). Metadata from live CKAN search response; package_show not individually fetched.

legal_risk: low (contains personal names of experts - published officially)
recommended_ingestion: periodic CSV sync as reference/lookup table (expert-witness selection features)
example_documents: top result of live package_search q=משפט; related: magistrate-court-list (בתי משפט השלום בחלוקה למחוזות), court-lost (מאגר בתי משפט ובתי דין לעבודה)
notes: Several small judiciary reference datasets exist on data.gov.il (court lists by district, rabbinical courts list, rabbinical court fee tariffs #860). No full-text decisions from the judiciary on the portal.

name_en: Enforcement and Collection Authority Statistical Tables (Hotzaa LaPoal)
publisher: רשות האכיפה והגבייה (Enforcement and Collection Authority)
rag_permission: yes for CC-BY items; caution on unlicensed
recommended_ingestion: one-time load for enforcement-statistics context; not operational data
example_documents: slugs: tables (טבלאות של רשות האכיפה והגבייה, CSV), stat2017 (23 CSV resources, CC-BY), stat2018, statreport2016-eca (24 XLSX)
notes: Statistics only - no case-level Hotzaa LaPoal data is open. Seen in live package_search q='הוצאה לפועל' and q=קנסות.

name_en: Government Companies and Serving Directors List
example_documents: seen in live package_search q=חברות; slug gsa, id 6c44da0d-e499-4233-973a-e404c607fb86
notes: Useful for conflict-of-interest checks and public-sector governance matters.

subcategory: parliamentary data - bills, laws, committees, MKs
access: open (geo/WAF restrictions observed from foreign cloud IPs)
historical_coverage: bills and laws metadata back decades; KNS_IsraelLaw covers full statute book metadata
metadata_availability: rich: KNS_Bill, KNS_Law, KNS_IsraelLaw, KNS_Agenda, committee sessions, MKs, votes
feeds: OData query interface acts as feed; no RSS
robots_policy: unknown; WAF returned HTTP 474 to our cloud fetcher (both http and https, service root and KNS_Law query)
terms_status: Knesset site terms; data considered public
license_status: unknown formal license; treated as open public-sector data
rag_permission: yes for metadata; bill/law document files are official public documents
last_observed_update: unknown (could not open endpoint from this environment)
stability: high (service stable for ~10 years; entity pages like KNS_Agenda indexed by Google)
technical_difficulty: medium (OData paging, geo-blocking requires IL egress or retry logic)
recommended_ingestion: OData incremental pulls on KNS_Bill/KNS_Law/KNS_IsraelLaw by LastUpdatedDate; run from Israeli IP or via hasadna knesset-data-pipelines mirrors. Overlaps legislation agent - keep as technical endpoint record
example_documents: entity set URL https://knesset.gov.il/Odata/ParliamentInfo.svc/KNS_Agenda (Google-indexed); community clients: github.com/zohar/knesset-mcp, hasadna/knesset-data
notes: Endpoint verified to exist via search index and active third-party clients, but our fetcher consistently received HTTP 474 (WAF/geo-block) on 2026-07-11 - expect ingestion to need IL-based egress.

name_en: CBS (Central Bureau of Statistics) Price Index & Series API
subcategory: statistics - price indices (CPI/מדד), linkage calculator, data series
historical_coverage: CPI series back to 1951; other indices per series
robots_policy: api.cbs.gov.il robots.txt fetch timed out from our cloud env (ConnectTimeout) - possible geo/network filtering
terms_status: CBS API terms on cbs.gov.il API pages
license_status: open government data; attribution to CBS expected
last_observed_update: unknown (endpoint not directly opened from this environment)
technical_difficulty: low-medium (may need IL egress; series-ID discovery via catalog)
recommended_ingestion: monthly pull of CPI and key indices (id=120010 CPI general) for הצמדה/interest calculators in the platform
example_documents: documented endpoints indexed by Google: api.cbs.gov.il/index/data/price?id=120010&format=xml, /Index/Catalog/Catalog, /index/catalog/TreeCalc, /index/data/price_selected; docs: cbs.gov.il 'מדדי מחירים באמצעות API' and en 'API interface' pages
notes: Critical for legal damage/linkage computations. Both WebFetch (robots ConnectTimeout) and proxied curl (403 CONNECT) failed from this cloud environment on 2026-07-11; endpoints confirmed via CBS documentation pages and indexed API URLs.

name_he: API ציבורי של בנק ישראל - שערי חליפין וריבית
name_en: Bank of Israel Public API (exchange rates, interest) + SDMX statistics
subcategory: central bank data - FX rates, BOI interest rate
historical_coverage: representative FX rates historical series decades back (via SDMX/statistics); PublicApi returns current rates
metadata_availability: SDMX structure metadata at edge.boi.gov.il (dataflows); PublicApi is minimal JSON
robots_policy: boi.org.il/PublicApi fetchable; edge.boi.gov.il robots fetch timed out from this env
license_status: open public data, attribution to Bank of Israel
update_frequency: daily (business days, rates set ~15:15 IL time)
recommended_ingestion: daily GetExchangeRates poll + SDMX historical backfill for FX/interest series used in judgment-linkage and contract calculations
example_documents: Live JSON verified 2026-07-11: exchangeRates array, 14 currencies (USD, EUR, GBP, JPY...), fields key/currentExchangeRate/currentChange/unit/lastUpdate=2026-07-10
notes: PublicApi confirmed live. SDMX endpoint (edge.boi.gov.il/FusionEdgeServer/sdmx) not directly opened from this env (robots ConnectTimeout) - mark for re-verification from production egress.

publisher: הסדנא לידע ציבורי (HaSadna - Public Knowledge Workshop), NGO
commercial: allowed (open-source project; underlying gov data open)
historical_coverage: national budget multi-year, contracts/supports/tenders aggregated from government sources; years vary
content_types: full-text search index of tenders/supports/gov decisions
metadata_availability: table schemas via SimpleDB API; documented in GitHub
api_type: REST: /api/query (read-only SQL over PostgreSQL, max 1000 rows/page), /search/<doc-type> (Elasticsearch), SimpleDB API
robots_policy: next.obudget.org robots.txt disallows crawler access to /api paths (our fetcher refused: 'URL is disallowed by robots.txt') - programmatic API use is nonetheless the documented intent
terms_status: open-source project (MIT-family licenses on repos); no formal API ToS
license_status: code MIT; data is aggregated open government data
recommended_ingestion: use /search doc-types tenders, entities, supports, gov_decisions, calls_for_bids for procurement/funding intelligence; /api/query for structured pulls
example_documents: Official docs fetched live from raw.githubusercontent.com (OpenBudget/BudgetKey/master/documentation/UsingTheAPI.md): GET /api/query?query=SELECT... (cached 1h), /search/{budget|tenders|entities|supports|gov_decisions|calls_for_bids|muni_budgets|...}
notes: API endpoint itself blocked to our robots-respecting fetcher, but full current API documentation retrieved live 2026-07-11 confirming endpoints and 16 search doc-types. 'entities' doc-type mirrors companies/amutot registries - useful unified entity search.

name_he: פרויקט knesset-data של הסדנא לידע ציבורי (GitHub)
name_en: hasadna/knesset-data - Knesset data tools and pipelines (GitHub)
subcategory: open-source tooling / mirrors for Knesset OData
historical_coverage: datapackage dumps of Knesset data; core repo last release v1.3.0 (2017-01-15)
metadata_availability: repo docs describe Knesset OData entities
api_type: n/a (libraries: knesset-data-python, knesset-data-datapackage, knesset-data-django; see also hasadna/knesset-data-pipelines for maintained pipelines)
update_frequency: core repo inactive since ~2017; pipelines repo more recent
recommended_ingestion: use as reference implementation + fallback mirror when Knesset OData geo-blocks cloud IPs; prefer knesset-data-pipelines outputs
example_documents: Repo page fetched live 2026-07-11: MIT license, 146 commits, sub-projects knesset-data-datapackage / knesset-data-python / knesset-data-django
notes: Not a data source per se but the standard community toolchain for the Knesset OData service; documents entity semantics that Knesset itself under-documents.

name_he: מאגר פסקי דין של בית המשפט העליון (HuggingFace - LevMuchnik)
name_en: Supreme Court of Israel dataset (HuggingFace: LevMuchnik/SupremeCourtOfIsrael)
publisher: Prof. Lev Muchnik (HUJI) & Dr. Inbal Yahav Shenberger (TAU), academic
subcategory: legal NLP corpus - Supreme Court verdicts full text
commercial: restricted by OpenRAIL use-based restrictions - review before commercial RAG use
content_types: rich case metadata (judges, parties, dates, verdict types)
rag_permission: likely yes with OpenRAIL conditions; underlying judgments are public court records - verify license terms for commercial deployment
hebrew_quality: native Hebrew (few English docs), formatting preserved
recommended_ingestion: bulk parquet ingest for historical Supreme Court RAG corpus + NLP training; supplement with live judiciary sources for post-2022
example_documents: Dataset card fetched live 2026-07-11: 751,194 documents, 5.31GB, OpenRAIL, supported by Israel Innovation Authority
notes: Largest ready-made Israeli case-law NLP corpus found. HuggingFace API search for 'israel court'/'hebrew legal' returned empty arrays (search API matches names only), located via direct dataset ID.

name_he: תקן בנקאות פתוחה בישראל (Open Banking IL)
name_en: Israel Open Banking Standard (Bank of Israel Banking Supervision)
subcategory: regulatory standard (API standard for account information/payment initiation)
access: open (standard documents public; the APIs themselves are bank-customer consented, not open data)
commercial: standard docs freely readable; API access requires licensed provider status
api_type: n/a for registry purposes (specifies bank APIs per חוק שירות מידע פיננסי; not a public data API)
recommended_ingestion: ingest standard documents as regulatory reference material for fintech/banking practice; NOT a data feed - open-banking APIs expose customer data to licensed providers only
example_documents: BOI 'תקנים והסברים בבנקאות פתוחה' page; bank implementations e.g. openbanking.co.il (Discount), leumiopenbanking.co.il
notes: Included per brief for relevance note only: legally relevant as regulated subject matter (Financial Information Service Law 2021), not as an ingestible open dataset.

publisher: המרכז למיפוי ישראל (Survey of Israel) / מערך הדיגיטל
access: open (JS API with token for embedding; some layers open)
api_type: JavaScript API + REST services (search/geocode, gush/helka lookup)
terms_status: GovMap API terms; token required for JS API
rag_permission: metadata/lookup use likely fine; verify terms
recommended_ingestion: on-demand parcel (גוש/חלקה) and address lookups for real-estate matters; not bulk-ingested
example_documents: api_examples.html page indexed; used widely by planning/real-estate tools
notes: Surfaced while verifying api.gov.il. No general-purpose 'api.gov.il' developer gateway was verifiable: gov.il/he/departments/topics/api_gov returned an empty shell page 2026-07-11 - central e-gov API portal status = unknown; per-service APIs (data.gov.il, GovMap, CBS, BOI) are the practical reality.

name_he: מאגרי בתי הדין הרבניים בפורטל הנתונים (תעריפי אגרות, פסקי דין לפי שנים)
name_en: Rabbinical Courts open datasets (fees tariffs, divorce judgments statistics)
subcategory: religious courts - fees and case statistics
historical_coverage: annual statistics by year (divorce judgments); current fee tariffs
license_status: mixed: dataset 862 (פסקי דין לגירושין לפי שנים) shows no license; 860 (תעריפי אגרות) not stated
rag_permission: caution on unlicensed items; factual data low risk
recommended_ingestion: one-time/annual load; fee tariffs useful for cost calculators in family-law matters
example_documents: slugs seen in live package_search: 860 (תעריפי אגרות של בתי הדין הרבניים), 861 (רשימת בתי דין), 862 (פסקי דין לגירושין לפי שנים)
notes: Statistics and reference data only - actual rabbinical court decisions are not on data.gov.il.
